visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit industrial bakery section. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a black mesh top, stands prominently in the foreground. She holds a large clear plastic container containing several round, golden-brown dinner rolls. She smiles at the camera, her facial expressions are animated. In the background, metal racks stacked with bread and price tags are visible. (2) The camera pans to the left, showing multiple metal racks filled with rows of dinner rolls, highlighting the volume of the bakery production. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a large warehouse retail environment. (3) Transition to an indoor home setting, likely a dining room. The same woman, now joined by another woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat, sits at a wooden table. They are holding the bread container and a single roll that has been broken in half. The background shows a domestic interior with a bookshelf and warm lighting. (4) A macro close-up shot focuses on the broken dinner roll, revealing a creamy, light-brown red bean milk filling nestled inside the white bread. A hand holds the roll steady for the camera to capture the internal texture. (5) Back to the medium shot of the two women at the table. The woman in the beret takes a bite of the bread and gestures with her hands as she speaks. Her friend looks on, nodding. They both display expressions of analytical tasting and discussion.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 維也納 紅豆牛奶餐包. [Variety]: 是優點 也是缺點. (2) [Subtitle]: 快看這個酥軟蓬鬆的表皮. (3) [Subtitle]: 圓通通的圓通通的. (4) [Slogan]: 一顆12塊. (5) [Variety]: 紅豆牛奶冰. (6) [Variety]: 也就是缺餡. (7) [Variety]: 有待加強.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in beret, 1 female companion in bucket hat.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret with a small logo and a black mesh-accented top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is shot in a Costco bakery with industrial metal racks and price tags. The second half is shot in a residential living/dining room with a wooden table, shelving, and soft interior lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track featuring a bright synthesizer melody and a prominent 4/4 drum beat. A female narrator speaks with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone and clear articulation. The acoustic environment sounds clean and processed. (2) A transition SFX, a light 'whoosh', occurs as the speaker shifts focus to the bakery shelves. The BGM remains constant in volume and tempo. The speaker's delivery is rapid and engaging, typical of commercial promotion. (3) A subtle shift in the background noise floor occurs as the scene changes to a domestic setting, introducing a slight room resonance. A second female voice is heard briefly in agreement. A soft plastic crinkling sound is audible as the bread container is handled. (4) The narrator's pitch variability increases as she describes the filling, emphasizing specific words like 'filling' and 'sweetness'. The BGM continues to loop seamlessly. (5) In the final phase, the dialogue becomes a more conversational exchange between two women. The vocal arousal level remains high, ending on a conclusive, slightly teasing tone. The music fades out abruptly at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Showcase -> Demonstration -> Detailed Review -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a consumer review of the Vienna Red Bean Milk Dinner Rolls from Costco, evaluating their physical appearance, price point, and internal filling quantity.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of Costco logo and product branding, direct review of the store's bakery item.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-energy social media editing style with colorful text overlays to engage viewers in a quick product assessment.
